title: Report on the proposed subsidy to First Hampshire & Dorset Limited
body: "The Subsidy Advice Unit (SAU) has published its report providing advice to Portsmouth City Council concerning the proposed subsidy to FirstBus.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of Portsmouth City Council’s assessment of compliance of its proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the Subsidy to First Hampshire & Dorset Limited by Portsmouth City Council case page.  "
